compose.title: Write a one-time note
compose.lede: The note is encrypted in your browser, stored briefly on the server, and destroyed the moment it is read.
compose.placeholder: Type your message here. It will never reach the server in plain text.
success.title: Note ready to share
success.lede: Copy the link and send it to the recipient. It will be destroyed the moment they open it.
success.kill.title: Destroy now
success.kill.hint: If you change your mind, you can burn the note before it is read.
success.kill.confirm: Destroy this note? This cannot be undone.
success.killed: Destroyed. The link is now inactive.
reveal.title: A note is waiting for you
reveal.lede: Reading this note will destroy it. You can only see it once.
reveal.tip1: Make sure you are ready to read it now
reveal.tip2: Make sure no one is looking over your shoulder
errors.pow_failed: Proof of work failed. Please retry.
